languages.text: {n}Не сдержавшись, Яруб озадаченно запускает пятерню во взъерошенные соломенные волосы.{/n} "Шутить изволите, Ваше Благородие?.." {n}Он что-то прикидывает в уме, затем кивает.{/n} "Уговор. Их светлость держит клинок под охраной, надо как-то уломать гвардейцев отойти от драгоценности, а дальше я уже сам справлюсь. Потом можете меня у госпиталя встретить с... ценным грузом. Я наверняка буду там — скоро смена караульных".

traits.locale_text: {n}Не сдержавшись, Яруб озадаченно запускает пятерню во взъерошенные соломенные волосы.{/n} "Шутить изволите, Ваше Благородие?.." {n}Он что-то прикидывает в уме, затем кивает.{/n} "Уговор. Их светлость держит клинок под охраной, надо как-то уломать гвардейцев отойти от драгоценности, а дальше я уже сам справлюсь. Потом можете меня у госпиталя встретить с... ценным грузом. Я наверняка буду там — скоро смена караульных".

languages.text: {n}Unable to help himself, Jarub runs a hand through his tousled, straw-coloured hair in puzzlement.{/n} "This has to be a joke. My {mf|lord|lady}...?" {n}Then something seems to click in his mind, and he nods.{/n} "Deal. But His Lordship keeps the blade under guard. We need to somehow lure the guards away from the treasure, and then I can handle the rest. After it's done, I'll be waiting outside the infirmary with the... precious cargo. I'll definitely be there — the guard shift change is coming up."

languages.text: {n}雅鲁布忍不住伸手挠了挠自己那头乱蓬蓬的稻草色头发，一脸困惑。{/n}“您一定是在开玩笑吧，大人……？”{n}接着，他像是想通了什么，点了点头。{/n}“一言为定。但舰长大人那把剑有人看守。得先想办法把守卫引开，剩下的交给我就行。事成之后，我会带着……那件贵重货物在医务室外面等您。我肯定会去的，守卫正好快换岗了。”
languages.original_text: {n}Unable to help himself, Jarub runs a hand through his tousled, straw-coloured hair in puzzlement.{/n} "This has to be a joke. My {mf|lord|lady}...?" {n}Then something seems to click in his mind, and he nods.{/n} "Deal. But His Lordship keeps the blade under guard. We need to somehow lure the guards away from the treasure, and then I can handle the rest. After it's done, I'll be waiting outside the infirmary with the... precious cargo. I'll definitely be there — the guard shift change is coming up."

traits.locale_text: {n}雅鲁布忍不住伸手挠了挠自己那头乱蓬蓬的稻草色头发，一脸困惑。{/n}“您一定是在开玩笑吧，大人……？”{n}接着，他像是想通了什么，点了点头。{/n}“一言为定。但舰长大人那把剑有人看守。得先想办法把守卫引开，剩下的交给我就行。事成之后，我会带着……那件贵重货物在医务室外面等您。我肯定会去的，守卫正好快换岗了。”

languages.text: {n}L'air perplexe, Jarub ne peut pas s'empêcher de passer sa main dans ses cheveux blonds en pagaille.{/n} « Vous plaisantez, c'est ça ? {mf|Mon seigneur|Ma dame}... ? » {n}Soudain, il semble comprendre quelque chose et hoche la tête.{/n} « Entendu. Mais Sa Seigneurie ne laisse jamais son épée sans surveillance. Il va d'abord falloir éloigner les gardes du trésor et ensuite, je pourrai m'occuper du reste. Quand ce sera fait, je vous attendrai devant l'infirmerie avec... ce précieux butin. J'y serai, vous pouvez y compter. La relève de la garde est pour bientôt. »
languages.original_text: {n}Unable to help himself, Jarub runs a hand through his tousled, straw-coloured hair in puzzlement.{/n} "This has to be a joke. My {mf|lord|lady}...?" {n}Then something seems to click in his mind, and he nods.{/n} "Deal. But His Lordship keeps the blade under guard. We need to somehow lure the guards away from the treasure, and then I can handle the rest. After it's done, I'll be waiting outside the infirmary with the... precious cargo. I'll definitely be there — the guard shift change is coming up."

Mais Sa Seigneurie ne laisse jamais son épée sans surveillance. Il va d'abord falloir éloigner les gardes du trésor et ensuite, je pourrai m'occuper du reste. Quand ce sera fait, je vous attendrai devant l'infirmerie avec... ce précieux butin. J'y serai, vous pouvez y compter. La relève de la garde est pour bientôt. »

languages.text: {n}Kendine engel olamayan Jarub; elini dağınık, saman sarısı saçlarının arasından geçiriyor.{/n} "Bu bir şaka olmalı. {mf|Lordum|Leydim}..." {n}Sonra aklına bir şey yatmış gibi başını sallıyor.{/n} "Anlaştık. Ancak Lord Hazretleri, kılıcı koruma altında tutuyor. Muhafızları hazineden bir şekilde uzaklaştırmamız gerekiyor, sonrasını ben halledebilirim. Bittiğinde revirin dışında o... Değerli kargoyla bekliyor olacağım. Kesinlikle orada olacağım. Nöbet değişimi yapılacak."
languages.original_text: {n}Unable to help himself, Jarub runs a hand through his tousled, straw-coloured hair in puzzlement.{/n} "This has to be a joke. My {mf|lord|lady}...?" {n}Then something seems to click in his mind, and he nods.{/n} "Deal. But His Lordship keeps the blade under guard. We need to somehow lure the guards away from the treasure, and then I can handle the rest. After it's done, I'll be waiting outside the infirmary with the... precious cargo. I'll definitely be there — the guard shift change is coming up."

traits.locale_text: {n}Kendine engel olamayan Jarub; elini dağınık, saman sarısı saçlarının arasından geçiriyor.{/n} "Bu bir şaka olmalı. {mf|Lordum|Leydim}..." {n}Sonra aklına bir şey yatmış gibi başını sallıyor.{/n} "Anlaştık. Ancak Lord Hazretleri, kılıcı koruma altında tutuyor. Muhafızları hazineden bir şekilde uzaklaştırmamız gerekiyor, sonrasını ben halledebilirim. Bittiğinde revirin dışında o... Değerli kargoyla bekliyor olacağım. Kesinlikle orada olacağım. Nöbet değişimi yapılacak."

languages.text: {n}Incapaz de contenerse, Jarub se pasa una mano por el pelo enmarañado del color de la paja, estupefacto.{/n} «Tiene que ser broma. ¿Mi {mf|señor|señora}...?». {n}Entonces, algo parece encajar en su mente y asiente.{/n} «Hecho. Pero su señoría mantiene la espada bien vigilada. Habrá que alejar a los guardias del tesoro, pero después puedo encargarme de todo. Cuando esté hecho, l{mf|e|a} esperaré fuera de la enfermería con su... valiosa carga. Estaré ahí, seguro. Ya es casi hora del cambio de guardia».
languages.original_text: {n}Unable to help himself, Jarub runs a hand through his tousled, straw-coloured hair in puzzlement.{/n} "This has to be a joke. My {mf|lord|lady}...?" {n}Then something seems to click in his mind, and he nods.{/n} "Deal. But His Lordship keeps the blade under guard. We need to somehow lure the guards away from the treasure, and then I can handle the rest. After it's done, I'll be waiting outside the infirmary with the... precious cargo. I'll definitely be there — the guard shift change is coming up."

traits.locale_text: {n}Incapaz de contenerse, Jarub se pasa una mano por el pelo enmarañado del color de la paja, estupefacto.{/n} «Tiene que ser broma. ¿Mi {mf|señor|señora}...?». {n}Entonces, algo parece encajar en su mente y asiente.{/n} «Hecho. Pero su señoría mantiene la espada bien vigilada. Habrá que alejar a los guardias del tesoro, pero después puedo encargarme de todo. Cuando esté hecho, l{mf|e|a} esperaré fuera de la enfermería con su... valiosa carga. Estaré ahí, seguro. Ya es casi hora del cambio de guardia».

languages.text: {n}Jarub fährt sich verwirrt mit einer Hand durch sein zerzaustes strohblondes Haar.{/n} "Das muss ein Scherz sein. {mf|Mylord|Mylady} ...?" {n}Dann scheint in seinem Verstand etwas zu klicken und er nickt.{/n} "Einverstanden. Aber Seine Lordschaft lässt die Klinge bewachen. Wir müssen die Wachen von dem Schatz irgendwie weglocken. Danach kümmere ich mich um den Rest. Wenn es vollbracht ist, warte ich vor der Krankenstation mit der ... kostbaren Fracht. Ich werde dort sein ... der Wachwechsel steht kurz bevor."
languages.original_text: {n}Unable to help himself, Jarub runs a hand through his tousled, straw-coloured hair in puzzlement.{/n} "This has to be a joke. My {mf|lord|lady}...?" {n}Then something seems to click in his mind, and he nods.{/n} "Deal. But His Lordship keeps the blade under guard. We need to somehow lure the guards away from the treasure, and then I can handle the rest. After it's done, I'll be waiting outside the infirmary with the... precious cargo. I'll definitely be there — the guard shift change is coming up."

Aber Seine Lordschaft lässt die Klinge bewachen. Wir müssen die Wachen von dem Schatz irgendwie weglocken. Danach kümmere ich mich um den Rest. Wenn es vollbracht ist, warte ich vor der Krankenstation mit der ... kostbaren Fracht. Ich werde dort sein ... der Wachwechsel steht kurz bevor."

languages.text: 「これは冗談だろう。俺の主…？」{n}すると、何かが頭の中で引っかかったように頷く。{/n}「承知した。だが、主は刀を構え続ける。宝のそばから警備隊を誘い出す方法を考えねば。それさえできれば、あとは俺が処理する。終わったら、俺は…貴重な荷物を抱えて、療養所の外で待っている。必ず行く。警備の交代が近づいている。」
languages.original_text: {n}Unable to help himself, Jarub runs a hand through his tousled, straw-coloured hair in puzzlement.{/n} "This has to be a joke. My {mf|lord|lady}...?" {n}Then something seems to click in his mind, and he nods.{/n} "Deal. But His Lordship keeps the blade under guard. We need to somehow lure the guards away from the treasure, and then I can handle the rest. After it's done, I'll be waiting outside the infirmary with the... precious cargo. I'll definitely be there — the guard shift change is coming up."
